title: Portfolio not possible to delete
excerpt: After creating a portfolio board, there is no way to delete it, let me add that I’m not trying to delete the initial portfolio board, I+m trying to delete a protfolio board I’ve just created for testing purposes

posts.author: rcacheira (Ricardo Cacheira)
posts.cookedHtml: After creating a portfolio board, there is no way to delete it, let me add that I’m not trying to delete the initial portfolio board, I+m trying to delete a protfolio board I’ve just created for testing purposes

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ricardo,

This is actually expected behaviour, as the board is part of a product solution. I apologise for the inconvenience here!

In this case as a workaround, they would need to put the boards in a folder and delete the folder (so the board delete). They can also just delete the projects folder the boards come in:

image (152)822×546 41.3 KB

Hope this helps!

posts.author: cristians (Cristian)
posts.cookedHtml: Once you delete the folder, everything that is is that folder gets archived, so I don’t think this is a fix.

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BiancaT have you got any news about this problem? I have my account archive full of testing portfolio mixed with usefull archived data.

Thank you very much

Davide

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I hear you and recognise this isn’t the most ideal approach or solution. I have shared this feedback with with our team internally - at this stage, I do not have any concrete updates to share regarding plans to change/improve this feature

posts.author: sconn (Sam C)
posts.cookedHtml: Following here for updates. Having the same issue!
